languages.original_text: "You worry needlessly, Master Proctor. That the people are showing their sincere appreciation for their ruler is a sign of their respect. What's more, I personally ensure that such processions are conducted in strict accordance with regulations, and, as such, your personal intervention is not required."

languages.text: "Вы напрасно беспокоитесь, господин проктор. То, что люди искренне выражают уважение к своему правителю — проявление почтительности. К тому же я лично слежу, чтобы подобные шествия проходили строго согласно уставу, и ваше личное вмешательство тут не требуется".

"You worry needlessly, Master Proctor. That the people are showing their sincere appreciation for their ruler is a sign of their respect. What's more, I personally ensure that such processions are conducted in strict accordance with regulations, and, as such, your personal intervention is not required."

What's more, I personally ensure that such processions are conducted in strict accordance with regulations, and, as such, your personal intervention is not required."

"You worry needlessly, Master Proctor. That the people are showing their sincere appreciation for their ruler is a sign of their respect. What's more, I personally ensure that such processions are conducted in strict accordance with regulations, and, as such, your personal intervention is not required."

languages.text: 「心配する必要はありません、プロクター殿。民衆が主君への感謝の意を表しているのは、敬意の表れです。さらに、私は、このような行列が厳格な規則に従って行われることを確認しています。そのため、貴殿の個人的な介入は不要です」
languages.original_text: "You worry needlessly, Master Proctor. That the people are showing their sincere appreciation for their ruler is a sign of their respect. What's more, I personally ensure that such processions are conducted in strict accordance with regulations, and, as such, your personal intervention is not required."

traits.locale_text: 「心配する必要はありません、プロクター殿。民衆が主君への感謝の意を表しているのは、敬意の表れです。さらに、私は、このような行列が厳格な規則に従って行われることを確認しています。そのため、貴殿の個人的な介入は不要です。」

languages.text: « Vous vous inquiétez pour rien, maître proctor. Il faut y voir une marque de respect de la part du peuple, qui tient à exprimer sa reconnaissance sincère envers {mf|son dirigeant|sa dirigeante}. En outre, je veille personnellement à ce que ces processions se déroulent conformément au règlement, aussi votre intervention est-elle superflue. »
languages.original_text: "You worry needlessly, Master Proctor. That the people are showing their sincere appreciation for their ruler is a sign of their respect. What's more, I personally ensure that such processions are conducted in strict accordance with regulations, and, as such, your personal intervention is not required."

traits.locale_text: « Vous vous inquiétez pour rien, maître proctor. Il faut y voir une marque de respect de la part du peuple, qui tient à exprimer sa reconnaissance sincère envers {mf|son dirigeant|sa dirigeante}. En outre, je veille personnellement à ce que ces processions se déroulent conformément au règlement, aussi votre intervention est-elle superflue. »

languages.text: "Eure Sorge ist unbegründet, Meister Proktor. Aufrichtige Dankbarkeit der Leute gegenüber {mf|ihrem Herrscher|ihrer Herrscherin} ist ein Zeichen ihres Respektes. Überdies sorge ich persönlich dafür, dass derartige Prozessionen im strikten Einklang mit den Regularien stattfinden. Euer persönliches Eingreifen ist also nicht erforderlich."
languages.original_text: "You worry needlessly, Master Proctor. That the people are showing their sincere appreciation for their ruler is a sign of their respect. What's more, I personally ensure that such processions are conducted in strict accordance with regulations, and, as such, your personal intervention is not required."

traits.locale_text: "Eure Sorge ist unbegründet, Meister Proktor. Aufrichtige Dankbarkeit der Leute gegenüber {mf|ihrem Herrscher|ihrer Herrscherin} ist ein Zeichen ihres Respektes. Überdies sorge ich persönlich dafür, dass derartige Prozessionen im strikten Einklang mit den Regularien stattfinden. Euer persönliches Eingreifen ist also nicht erforderlich."

languages.text: "Gereksiz yere endişeleniyorsunuz Üstat Üsteğmen. İnsanların yöneticilerine içten takdirlerini göstermeleri, saygılarının bir işaretidir. Dahası, bu tür törenlerin yönetmeliklere tam uygunluk içinde yürütülmesini bizzat sağlıyorum ve bu nedenle kişisel müdahalenize gerek yoktur."
languages.original_text: "You worry needlessly, Master Proctor. That the people are showing their sincere appreciation for their ruler is a sign of their respect. What's more, I personally ensure that such processions are conducted in strict accordance with regulations, and, as such, your personal intervention is not required."

traits.locale_text: "Gereksiz yere endişeleniyorsunuz Üstat Üsteğmen. İnsanların yöneticilerine içten takdirlerini göstermeleri, saygılarının bir işaretidir. Dahası, bu tür törenlerin yönetmeliklere tam uygunluk içinde yürütülmesini bizzat sağlıyorum ve bu nedenle kişisel müdahalenize gerek yoktur."

languages.text: «Se preocupa en vano, maese procurador. Que la gente muestre su genuina gratitud a su líder es una muestra de respeto. Y le diré más: yo mismo me aseguro de que estas procesiones se lleven a cabo respetando a rajatabla las normativas, de modo que su intervención no será necesaria».
languages.original_text: "You worry needlessly, Master Proctor. That the people are showing their sincere appreciation for their ruler is a sign of their respect. What's more, I personally ensure that such processions are conducted in strict accordance with regulations, and, as such, your personal intervention is not required."

traits.locale_text: «Se preocupa en vano, maese procurador. Que la gente muestre su genuina gratitud a su líder es una muestra de respeto. Y le diré más: yo mismo me aseguro de que estas procesiones se lleven a cabo respetando a rajatabla las normativas, de modo que su intervención no será necesaria».

languages.text: “你多虑了，监察官大师。民众向统治者表达由衷的感激，这正体现了他们的虔敬。况且，我会亲自确保此类活动严格按规章进行，无需你亲自介入。”
languages.original_text: "You worry needlessly, Master Proctor. That the people are showing their sincere appreciation for their ruler is a sign of their respect. What's more, I personally ensure that such processions are conducted in strict accordance with regulations, and, as such, your personal intervention is not required."

traits.locale_text: “你多虑了，监察官大师。民众向统治者表达由衷的感激，这正体现了他们的虔敬。况且，我会亲自确保此类活动严格按规章进行，无需你亲自介入。”
